note: SPY is 7.7% above its 200-day average, signaling an uptrend, but the market is not cheap by cyclically-adjusted measures (CAPE 39.6). Inflation is running well above the Fed target (core PCE 3.4%, CPI 4.2%), rates are steady at 3.50-3.75% with little relief in sight before year-end. A heavy week of macro events culminates in Friday's Jobs Report. Our own candidate watchlist shows MSFT at only a 1.6% margin of safety and AAPL 46% above our fair value — neither is in the buy zone under normal conditions. Cautious posture is warranted: demand a larger discount before deploying cash.
